name: M60 Machine Gun
prompt:
Vietnam War era M60 general purpose machine gun. "The Pig" - the squad automatic weapon carried by US forces.

Physical structure (~1.1m total length):
- Receiver: large dark metal body, rectangular profile
- Barrel: heavy barrel with distinctive perforated heat shield (cylindrical with holes pattern - use cylinder geo)
- Bipod: two folding legs at barrel end, splayed outward when deployed
- Feed tray: top-opening feed cover, hinged at front
- Pistol grip: vertical, with trigger
- Buttstock: fixed stock with buffer assembly, rubber buttpad
- Carrying handle: on top of barrel, folding
- Front sight: blade type at barrel end
- Rear sight: on feed cover
- Ammunition belt: disintegrating link belt with cartridges, hanging from left side feed tray (simplified as a strip)
- Gas system: gas tube under barrel

Colors: Dark parkerized metal (0x333338), black furniture (0x1a1a1a), brass ammo belt (0xb5a642)
Orientation: On bipod (deployed), barrel along +Z, slightly elevated
Scale: Real-world meters (total length ~1.1m)
animations: No animation needed for weapon prop
